# Because You Are Busy — Operations · Transformation · Growth

> Since 2005, Because You Are Busy (BYAB) helps founders and managing partners who are too busy to do it all. We externalize operations, drive transformation, and engineer growth — so leaders can lead.

## Pages

- [Homepage](/) — Agency landing page with services, track record, company history with backlinks, stats, about, testimonial, and contact form
- [Components](/components) — Complete design system: brand identity, design tokens, UI components, and site section reference

## Services

1. Operational Backbone — Externalized general secretariat, admin, and finance for founders drowning in back-office
2. Transformation & Data — Systems architecture, project governance, and data strategy that turn chaos into clarity
3. Growth Engine — Outbound, acquisition funnels, and predictable sales machines for inevitable revenue growth
4. Legal Practice Ops — Purpose-built admin, finance, and organizational support for demanding law firms

## Who We Are

Three forces converge at Because You Are Busy:

- **Anne Grosz** ([LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/annegrosz)) — 20 years of hands-on operational leadership. Former Secretary General at [Vatier & Associés](https://www.infocession.fr/avocats/vatier-associes) (Paris law firm). Founded BYAB in 2005, then Because You Are Busy in 2015. Expert in externalized general secretariat, admin, finance, and law firm operations.
- **Georges Grosz** ([LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/georges-grosz-8aa9613)) — 22 years as Senior Executive Consultant at CGI (international IT & management consulting). Professor at Université Paris 1 Panthéon-Sorbonne. Expert in transformation, information systems, project governance, and data.
- **Romain Cornu** ([LinkedIn](https://fr.linkedin.com/in/romaincornu)) — Growth engineer. Former Head of Marketing at Datananas, [Head of Growth at Clovis](https://www.avizio.fr/expert/romain-cornu), Growth Advisor at MerciApp, Teacher Outbound at GrowthMakers, CEO of [Oysterz](https://www.societe.com/societe/oysterz-884894296.html) ([Le Figaro](https://entreprises.lefigaro.fr/oysterz-17/entreprise-884894296)). Expert in outbound B2B, acquisition funnels, and scalable sales machines.

## Company History

- **2005** — [Because You Are Busy (B Y A B)](https://annuaire-entreprises.data.gouv.fr/entreprise/because-you-are-busy-b-y-a-b-481631471) (SIREN 481 631 471) created. First "right-hand for busy founders" model. [Ultra-lean, ultra-profitable structure](https://www.pappers.fr/entreprise/b-y-a-b-because-you-are-busy-481631471) — revenue ~130,000€, 57%+ operating profitability, zero external debt. ([Le Figaro](https://entreprises.lefigaro.fr/b-y-a-b-b-y-a-b-83/entreprise-481631471))
- **2015** — [Because You Are Busy](https://entreprises.lefigaro.fr/because-you-are-busy-94/entreprise-814783056) (SIREN 814 783 056) created by Anne Grosz. Specialization in [externalized general secretariat](https://www.societe.com/societe/because-you-are-busy-814783056.html) for law firms and SMEs. Anne brings 8 years as Secretary General at [Vatier & Associés](https://www.infocession.fr/avocats/vatier-associes).
- **2020** — Transformation from SAS to SARL. Craft model over startup model. Confidential accounts, trust-based client relationships. ([Pappers](https://www.pappers.fr/entreprise/because-you-are-busy-814783056))
- **2025** — Georges Grosz joins as co-manager. Transformation & data layer added. 22 years at CGI, professor at Sorbonne.
- **2025–2026** — Romain Cornu joins. Growth engineering capability: ICP, packaged offers, outbound funnels, performance metrics. Former Head of Growth at Clovis, Growth Advisor at MerciApp, CEO of [Oysterz](https://entreprises.lefigaro.fr/oysterz-17/entreprise-884894296).

## Key Metrics

- 20 years serving founders since 2005
- 57% operating profitability
- 3 complementary expertise pillars
- 0€ external debt raised

## Track Record

- B2B SaaS Scale-Up — Growth Engineering (2025)
- National Law Firm — Operations Restructuring (2024)
- Tech PME — Transformation & Data (2025)

## Locations

Paris & La Rochelle, France

## Contact

hello@becausebusy.com

## Brand Promise

"Because you are busy, we do the work that frees your time — and we do it in a way that makes your growth more readable, more predictable, and better controlled."
